message:
feat: Implement 6 core stdlib modules (uuid, types, enum, decimal, argparse, secrets)

uuid.zig: RFC 4122 UUIDs with uuid1/uuid3/uuid4/uuid5 generation
types.zig: Python type objects (FunctionType, ModuleType, SimpleNamespace, etc.)
enum.zig: Enum, IntEnum, StrEnum, Flag support with comptime generation
decimal.zig: Arbitrary precision decimal arithmetic with context
argparse.zig: Command-line argument parser with full action support
secrets.zig: Cryptographically secure random generation
